title: GreenSofa Taiwan Public-Goods Tooling Receipts
dek: GreenSofa's public HackMD itemizes public-goods tooling funding and links to a Taiwan Hypercerts Dashboard.
excerpt: A high-confidence source-backed story for GreenSofa / Greenpill Taiwan.
body:
GreenSofa is one of the stronger public chapter proof surfaces in the research artifact.

The HackMD source itemizes public funding receipts, and the FAB DAO dashboard gives the website a public Hypercerts-related proof surface. Use the exact receipt claims only with source links visible.

## Sources

- S025: https://hackmd.io/@greensofa/home
- S058: https://fabdaotw.github.io/
- S026: https://giveth.io/project/greensofa-greenpill-taiwan
author: Greenpill Network research
